_comment_host_share: Austin dynamic share for the 'More earnings' plan, by guest booking lead time (days before pickup), from the Turo host dashboard. Highest matching min_lead_days wins.
_comment_discounts: Trip-length discounts as set in Turo (consistent across cars). Only daily_pct applies to 3-4 night windows; weekly/monthly stored for longer trips. Highest matching min_days wins.
_comment_turo_markup: Beyond the visible trip discount, Turo reduces the search/booking price a further ~5% below your calendar base. Measured by comparing your calendar prices to scraped booking prices across 11 listings/windows: booking was consistently ~92% of calendar (flat across lead times), i.e. ~3% trip discount + ~5% extra. The suggested calendar price grosses both up. Re-measure if Turo changes.
